objects.name: TP-Link, Photoshop, OpenVPN, Norton VPN vulnerabilities
objects.description: Cisco Talos’ Vulnerability Discovery & Research team recently disclosed eight vulnerabilities in TP-Link, and one each in Adobe Photoshop, OpenVPN, and Gen Digital's Norton VPN. The vulnerabilities mentioned in this blog post have been patched by their respective vendors, in adherence to Cisco’s third-party vulnerability

external_references.description: TP-Link, Photoshop, OpenVPN, Norton VPN vulnerabilities
